nodes.label: Tests for MANGABA_HOME credential-file read blocking in file_safety.  Regression
Point ``_mangaba_home_path()`` at a tmp dir for isolated checks.
Create the file (with parents) so realpath() resolves it.
Non-credential files inside MANGABA_HOME stay readable.
Only the top-level auth.json is the credential store; a file with the     same n
Regression guard: the original skills/.hub deny must keep working.
A path that traverses through a sibling dir back into MANGABA_HOME's     auth.js
A symlink pointing at MANGABA_HOME/auth.json from outside the home     must be b
Bypass guard: a relative path like ``"auth.json"`` resolved by     ``read_file_t
.env in MANGABA_HOME holds API keys — blocked.
webhook_subscriptions.json holds per-route HMAC secrets — blocked.
Files under mcp-tokens/ hold OAuth tokens — blocked.
Nested files inside mcp-tokens/ are also blocked.
The mcp-tokens directory itself is blocked (listing is exfiltrating).
config.yaml is NOT a credential file — agent should still be     able to read it
